ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic variable (e.g., % White, Median Income) */,
  "variable_description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic variable */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of demographic variable (e.g., racial, economic, educational) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable (e.g., percentage, dollars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_averages" (
  "average_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of national average */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic variable */,
  "national_average" REAL /* National average value for the variable */,
  "national_standard_deviation" REAL /* National standard deviation for the variable */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("average_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_national_averages_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES demographic_variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_averages" (
  "state_average_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of state average */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic variable */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "state_average" REAL /* State average value for the variable */,
  "state_standard_deviation" REAL /* State standard deviation for the variable */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_average_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_averages_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES demographic_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_averages_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proximity_1mile" (
  "proximity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of proximity data */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic variable */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HFC production facility */,
  "one_mile_average" REAL /* Average value within 1 mile of the facility */,
  "one_mile_standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation within 1 mile of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proximity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proximity_1mile_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proximity_1mile_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES demographic_variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proximity_3mile" (
  "proximity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of proximity data */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic variable */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HFC production facility */,
  "three_mile_average" REAL /* Average value within 3 miles of the facility */,
  "three_mile_standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation within 3 miles of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proximity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proximity_3mile_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proximity_3mile_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES demographic_variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proximity_5mile" (
  "proximity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of proximity data */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic variable */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HFC production facility */,
  "five_mile_average" REAL /* Average value within 5 miles of the facility */,
  "five_mile_standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation within 5 miles of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proximity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proximity_5mile_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES demographic_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proximity_5mile_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proximity_10mile" (
  "proximity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of proximity data */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic variable */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HFC production facility */,
  "ten_mile_average" REAL /* Average value within 10 miles of the facility */,
  "ten_mile_standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation within 10 miles of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proximity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proximity_10mile_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES demographic_variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proximity_10mile_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HFC production facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the HFC production facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the facility */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the facility */,
  "production_capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_demographics" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HFC production facility */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic variable */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value for the demographic variable at the facility */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id", "variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_data_sources" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HFC production facility */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data_sources" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic variable */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id", "source_id")
)
